market_snapshot.dominant_narrative: Bitcoin made its first sub-$60K daily close since Q3 2024, with 50,000 BTC moved to exchanges at a loss while long-term holders simultaneously set a record 181,000 BTC accumulation — a market at maximum stress and maximum opportunity at once.

selected_keyword.why: Bitcoin posted its first sub-$60,000 daily close since September 2024 on June 26, triggering maximum search interest in Persian-language crypto communities; MAXGAZINE covered ETF outflows (Jun 28) but has not yet analyzed the deeper capitulation-vs-accumulation tension dominating today's market.
